zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Engaine於1258年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾拉可頓時，她的父親John Engaine29歲，母親Joan Greinville22歲。她於1277年與Roger Huntingfield結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年在英國英格蘭享年54歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可門達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Engaine was born in 1258, in Laxton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, John Engaine, was 29 and her mother, Joan Greinville, was 22. She married Roger Huntingfield in 1277. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1312, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Mendham, Suffolk, England.

Elle a épousé Roger Huntingfield en 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1312, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Mendham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Engaine(이)가 1258년 영국 노르섬프토실르 라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Greinville(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1277년 Roger Huntingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 멘드함에 묻혔다.

Она умерла в 1312 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности мендхам, суффолк, Англия.
